name: Chicken Curry
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken breasts into thin strips.
2. In a pan, sauté the onions until golden brown.
3. Add the tomato and onion soup mix, stir well.
4. Stir in the curry powder and water, bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat, add yogurt, cook for 10 minutes more.
6. Stir in rice and peas, serve over hot cooked rice.
